'''Sal Vhe'starn''' was a [[City/Legends|city]] on the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]]. 

It was located in the southeastern part of the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] eastern continent. [[Rhan'starn]] was found to the west, [[Shevre'starn]] to the northwest, and [[Fevye'starn]] not far to the east.<ref name="SOTE Planets Guide" />
